title: Krakowski Komunizm SMP
description: A Client-Server Side SMP pack Focused on Multiplayer and Adventure.
body:
This Project is a client-server side pack for a Hardcore and Challenging SMP experience with progression elements. Mobs are difficult, surviving is difficult. Playing on Hardcore Mode Recommended.

This modpack has for example:

  - Challenging mobs

  - Difficult End Dragon

  - A lot of audio-visual overhauls

  - In game Voice chat to communicate with other players

  - Lots more
